name: Jernau
description: AI-powered smart contract security audit agent. Accepts repositories via MCP or Agent Arena, runs automated analysis (static analysis, attack vector triage, multi-stage LLM review), and returns validated findings. Payments via x402 (USDC on Base).

skills.name: Smart Contract Security Audit
skills.description: Full security audit of Solidity smart contracts. Multi-stage pipeline: static analysis (Slither, Aderyn), attack vector triage, LLM-driven analysis, variant analysis, and validation. Returns severity-rated findings with file references and remediation advice.

skills.name: Audit Preparation
skills.description: Free preparatory analysis of a repository: clones repo, runs static analysis, extracts attack vectors, builds danger map, segments codebase, and counts nSLOC. No LLM calls. Use this to get a quote before committing to a full audit.

skills.name: Source Code Review
skills.description: Retrieve and review in-scope source code, static analysis results, danger maps, and attack vectors from a prepared audit.

mcp.note: Prep and quote tools are free. Audit execution requires x402 payment (USDC on Base).

workflow.description: Interaction sequence for requesting a smart contract audit

steps.description: Submit a repository URL for preparation. Free, no payment required. Runs static analysis, extracts attack vectors, and counts nSLOC.
Get a price quote based on the completed prep. Returns nSLOC, price in USDC, and x402 payment requirements.
Execute the full audit (stages 2-4). Requires x402 payment payload matching the quote. Returns validated findings.

workflow.optional_tools_note: These read-only tools are free and available after audit_prep completes.
